records.title: Germany vs Paraguay as it happened: Germans knocked out of 2026 World Cup after dramatic shootout
records.description: Live updates from Boston as Germany take on Paraguay in the World Cup round of 32.

records.title: Paraguay eliminate Germany on penalties despite Neuer heroics
records.description: Paraguay knock Germany out of the World Cup in a dramatic penalty shootout, after VAR earlier ruled out a Jonathan Tah header in extra time.

records.title: Germany dumped out of World Cup by Paraguay on penalties
records.description: Kai Havertz, Nick Woltemade and Jonathan Tah missed crucial penalties as Germany were eliminated from the World Cup in a shootout by Paraguay.
